title: Compact Spawn Eggs
description: Backports all 1.21.5+ spawn eggs with the small egg size and mod compatibility
body:
# The difference between this and other resource packs / vanilla?
- This resource pack backports spawn eggs to look like in 1.21.5, but also making them all small like the standard egg to make them more "cute" and consistent while still having all the details of their corresponding mob.

- Includes all 87 vanilla mobs.
  - Compatible with [Barched](https://modrinth.com/mod/barched), [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) and [Copper Age Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age).

- Compatibility for:
  - [Herios' Helian Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/herios-helian-mod)
  - [Create Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery)
  - More coming soon!!

# Note
In order for this resource pack to work, I had to create an item model for each spawn egg, because for versions prior to 1.21.5, they only work with color tints, and cannot use an object texture directly.
